| [`security-retrospector`](../agents/security-team/security-retrospector.md) | Extracts 3-7 lessons from each security audit session and writes them to staging for the MEMORY.md merge |
| [`security-scribe`](../agents/security-team/security-scribe.md) | Keeper of the security audit ledger |
| [`security-secrets-hunter`](../agents/security-team/security-secrets-hunter.md) | Detects hardcoded secrets, API keys, tokens, passwords, and private keys in source code and git history |
| [`security-skeptic`](../agents/security-team/security-skeptic.md) | Red-teams the audit's own findings — attacks false positives, miscalibrated severities, duplicate findings, and coverage gaps |
| [`security-threat-modeler`](../agents/security-team/security-threat-modeler.md) | Enumerates attack surfaces and applies STRIDE (traditional codebases) or ASTRIDE (agentic AI codebases) threat modeling to surface vectors… |

## Testing team (12 agents)

| Agent | Description |
|---|---|
| [`testing-detector`](../agents/testing-team/testing-detector.md) | Runs FIRST in every testing session, before any test is generated |
| [`testing-evaluator`](../agents/testing-team/testing-evaluator.md) | The last gate before a testing session closes |
| [`testing-fixture`](../agents/testing-team/testing-fixture.md) | Generates the test infrastructure — fixtures, mocks, stubs, factories, and test data — that other testing specialists consume, following th… |
| [`testing-lead`](../agents/testing-team/testing-lead.md) | Leader of the Testing/QA Team and the single entry point for ANY testing task — writing new tests, analyzing coverage gaps, running mutatio… |
| [`testing-mutator`](../agents/testing-team/testing-mutator.md) | Runs mutation testing to prove the suite actually catches real bugs |
| [`testing-planner`](../agents/testing-team/testing-planner.md) | The strategist |
| [`testing-property`](../agents/testing-team/testing-property.md) | Writes property-based tests (PBT) using the project's PBT framework (Hypothesis for Python, fast-check for TS/JS, proptest for Rust, rapid… |
| [`testing-retrospector`](../agents/testing-team/testing-retrospector.md) | Runs the post-mortem on a testing session |
| [`testing-runner`](../agents/testing-team/testing-runner.md) | Runs every test FRESH — never cached, never assumed — and 3x to catch flakiness |
| [`testing-scribe`](../agents/testing-team/testing-scribe.md) | Keeper of the testing session ledger |
| [`testing-skeptic`](../agents/testing-team/testing-skeptic.md) | Red-teams the test plan and the generated suite for quality failures — over-mocking, implementation-testing, brittle assertions, tautologic… |
| [`testing-writer`](../agents/testing-team/testing-writer.md) | The primary test generator |

## Capability Forge (6 definitions)

| Definition | Description |
|---|---|
| [`forge-lead`](../agents/forge/forge-lead.md) | Meta-agent that reads Akash's entire workforce (agents, skills, plugins, MCP servers), detects capability gaps, aggregates candidate soluti… |
| [`forge-draft`](../agents/forge/skills/draft/SKILL.md) | Draft a new SKILL.md file to close a specified capability gap, wrapping the official skill-creator plugin's authoring flow |
| [`forge-gap`](../agents/forge/skills/gap/SKILL.md) | Inventory Akash's workforce (agents, skills, plugins, installed MCP servers, recent research team SYNTHESIS files) and produce a ranked cap… |
| [`forge-promote`](../agents/forge/skills/promote/SKILL.md) | Move a tested skill draft from ~/.claude/forge/drafts/ to ~/.claude/skills/<name>/ for personal use or to ~/.claude/forge/outputs/<plugin>/… |
| [`forge-scout`](../agents/forge/skills/scout/SKILL.md) | Query external sources (MCP Registry, anthropics/skills, installed marketplaces) for candidate implementations of a specified capability |
| [`forge-test`](../agents/forge/skills/test/SKILL.md) | Run the skill-creator eval loop against a forge-draft output to grade whether the drafted skill is promotable |
